name: 2 leaders morning Mon-Sat
description: 2 leaders on shift Mon–Sat morning (before midday)

name: 2 leaders evening Mon-Sat
description: 2 leaders on shift Mon–Sat evening (after midday)

name: 1 leader Sunday morning
description: 1 leader on shift Sunday morning

name: 2 leaders Sunday evening
description: 2 leaders on shift Sunday evening

name: Max 3hr LOD block
description: No LOD block longer than 3 continuous hours

name: LOD roles only
description: Only SM, AM, or SUP may hold LOD blocks

name: LOD at store open/close
description: LOD block active at store open AND store close each day

name: LOD overlap setup/EOD
description: LOD block must overlap Morning Till Setup and End of Day Safe Count

name: 12hr minimum gap
description: 12-hour minimum gap between shifts

name: Max 5 days/week
description: No more than 5 days worked per week

name: Full-timers 2 consecutive days off
description: Full-timers get 2 consecutive days off per week

name: No shift before 7AM
description: No shift starts before 7:00 AM

name: No shift after 9PM
description: No shift ends after 9:00 PM

name: SM 9hr shifts
description: SM shifts exactly 9 hours including 1-hr lunch

name: AM 8hr shifts
description: AM shifts exactly 8 hours including 30-min lunch

name: No clopening
description: No closing shift immediately followed by opening shift next day

name: Max 5 consecutive days
description: Max 5 consecutive days before mandatory day off

name: Cashier every hour
description: At least 1 cashier every operating hour, no gaps

name: Min 4hr cashier block
description: No cashier block shorter than 4 hours

name: 2nd register Fri-Sat
description: Second register required Fri–Sat 11AM–6PM

name: FTC cashier priority
description: FTC gets first priority for cashier assignments

name: PT cashier secondary
description: PT gets second priority if FTC unavailable

name: SM Monday call (soft)
description: SM should attend Monday 2PM call

defaultParameters.description: SM should attend Monday 2PM conference call

name: No task overlap during call
description: No other tasks overlap the call window for attendees

name: Call window blocked
description: Call runs Monday 2:00–4:00 PM, attendees blocked

name: Only SM/AM on call
description: Only SM and AMs may be assigned the call

name: No call if SM blocked Monday
description: No call generated if SM has Monday blocked

defaultParameters.description: Skip Monday conference call if SM is unavailable on Monday

name: SM 20hr planning/week
description: SM gets 20 hrs planning per week, 3+ days

name: AM 6hr planning/week
description: Each AM gets 6 hrs planning per week

name: SUP 3hr planning/week
description: Each SUP gets 3 hrs planning per week

name: No planning last hour
description: No planning block in last hour of store day

name: Planning spread 3+ days
description: Planning spread across 3+ days

name: Rotate weekends 4-week
description: Rotate weekends across 4-week cycle

name: Max 3 closes/week
description: No one closes more than 3 times per week

name: Max 3 opens/week
description: No one opens more than 3 times per week

name: No identical days-off 3+ weeks
description: No identical days-off pattern 3+ consecutive weeks

name: Balance Fri/Sat nights
description: Balance Fri/Sat nights across staff over 4 weeks

name: Max 2 back-to-back 9hr days
description: No more than 2 back-to-back 9-hour days

name: PT 1 weekend day off/rotation
description: PT associates get 1 weekend day off per rotation

name: Flag below 90% target hours
description: Flag anyone averaging below 90% of target hours over 4 weeks

name: Total hours within budget
description: Total weekly hours must not exceed labor budget

name: Alert if over target
description: Alert if any employee exceeds target hours

name: Alert if under target by 2hr
description: Alert if any employee is under target by more than 2 hrs

name: Overtime flag full-timers 40hr
description: Overtime flag if any full-timer exceeds 40 hours

name: Flag PT over 12hr
description: Flag if any PT associate exceeds 12 hours

name: Labor cost over budget 5%
description: Flag if labor cost exceeds budget by more than 5%
